title: Taylor Clay Products
description:
Taylor Clay Products specializes in premium architectural brick, thin brick, and custom masonry
solutions, catering to architects and builders for over 75 years. The company offers a wide se
lection of colors, textures, and finishes, including custom blends tailored to specific project
s.

We will upload 72gb of corporate data soon. Employee personal information (DL and other persona
l docs), contracts, client information, drawings and specifications.
